raw_consumer_statement: Although I wrote them the previous year closing this account, Barclays Corporation paid {$49.00}. for a subscription I no longer wanted and sent me a bill. I wrote them asking for an explanation. They started billing me large punitive fees without trying to resolve the issue. They are being punitive and vindictive in trying to ruin my credit stating I am a major credit risk. Their fees are over {$300.00}. Why was this mistake made in the first place?
